title: Code Context
documentation:
## Purpose

Code Context provides background information about the codebase, architecture, or existing code that a model should take into account when generating or analyzing code. It is a free-form text field with a generous character limit.

## When to use

Use this media type to pass snippets of existing code, file structure descriptions, API contracts, or other developer context to a code-focused node. Pair it with [Programming Language](https://capdag.com/browse/media:programming-language;textable) and [Coding Style](https://capdag.com/browse/media:coding-style;textable) for best results.

## Notes

The maximum length is 65,536 characters. Prioritize the most relevant context rather than including entire files, as excess context can reduce output quality.
